name: 24/7 Medical Billing Services
description: One-stop solution for physician billing requirements in Greensboro and North Carolina with modernized billing services.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Hari has been forthcoming, meticulous in his work, always ready to help, a great communicator, and extremely prompt
Their level of service, responsiveness and attention to detail have been excellent
Charges are below the market rates and therefore are a great value for money

sentiment.summary: 24/7 Medical Billing Services receives overwhelming praise for professional, responsive service with efficient operations and competitive pricing—no negative feedback identified across all testimonials.

name: Complete Medical Billing & Advocacy
description: Personalized, specialty-focused billing and consulting services.

name: Digital Medical Billing Inc. (DMBI)
description: Full-service medical billing using a two-tier billing system powered by DigiDMS platform for improved claims processing and reporting.

name: MedCare MSO
description: Structured billing and administrative services focusing on accuracy, compliance, claims processing, and AR management.

name: Practolytics
description: End-to-end RCM services acting as an extended RCM department, serving over 28 specialties.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Truly one of the best decisions that I have made for our practice
Customer service to be unsurpassed. All phone calls are returned
Practice more than tripled in visits and we no longer had to tell patients we aren't in the network
Invaluable to our practice. Team is not only knowledgeable but incredibly supportive

sentiment.summary: Practolytics receives exceptional praise from long-term healthcare clients (5-10+ year relationships) who consistently credit the team's expertise, responsiveness, and strategic guidance with measurable business growth and operational confidence.

name: Precise Medical Billing Services
description: Customized billing solutions based on practice size and specialty for revenue tracking and claims management.

name: Precision Practice Management
description: Full range of revenue cycle solutions, medical coding, charge coding, credentialing, and technical support for practices across North Carolina.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Pursued AR claims that would normally be written-off and was able to collect
Stepped up and took control of transition from old billing service
Generated normal collections in a short time

sentiment.summary: Precision Practice Management receives strong praise for effectively recovering difficult accounts receivable and managing billing service transitions efficiently.

name: The EMS Billing & Coding Services Of The Carolinas LLC
description: Team of certified billers and insurance specialists for EMS billing and coding, allowing focus on patient care.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Dedication to accuracy and efficiency has significantly improved our revenue cycle management
Working with E.M.S. has been a true time saver for my private practice
Hiring Stephanie has been one of the best decisions for my private practice
Seamless handling of billing needs has been nothing short of exceptional

sentiment.summary: Uniformly positive reputation with consistent praise for professional, efficient billing services that improve revenue cycles, save time, and provide responsive, knowledgeable expert support.

name: Wise Medical Billing LLC
description: Works with small to mid-sized practices to improve claim processing and AR follow-ups, reducing delays.
